sd15.label: Stable Diffusion 1.5
compatibility_warnings: Best proven path for normal txt2img/img2img/inpaint in this console.
ControlNet remains external/deferred unless a real stable-diffusion.cpp path is added.

sdxl.label: Stable Diffusion XL
compatibility_warnings: Some SDXL targets are staged/selectable without individual smoke proof.
Keep support claims below runtime-proof level until a bounded PNG smoke run exists.

sdxl-turbo.label: SDXL Turbo
compatibility_warnings: Requires low steps and cfg_scale 0 in the current mapper.
Uses the fp16 safetensors staging target when BigMac runtime proof exists.

flux.label: Flux
compatibility_warnings: Only the runtime-proven fp8 path should be treated as available.
Full Flux component staging requires model, VAE, CLIP-L, and T5XXL assets.

txt2img full control surface.notes: Prompt, negative prompt, target, VAE, sampler, scheduler, steps, CFG, seed, size, tiling, and metadata toggles are visible; A1111-only extras remain gated.

img2img full control surface.notes: Backend accepts core generation controls plus denoising strength and init image; UI parity controls are being folded into the edit panel.

inpainting.notes: Canvas mask, alpha-to-mask conversion, blank-mask rejection, and core generation params are supported; A1111 mask blur/masked content/inpaint area are not claimed.

highres fix.notes: Two-pass txt2img to Pillow upscale only; not A1111 latent highres fix.

upscale/extras.notes: Pillow upscale and Real-ESRGAN route exist; face restoration is gated.

model registry.notes: Capabilities expose configured and discovered targets.

VAE registry.notes: Discovered VAE selection is exposed when supported.

LoRA registry with weights.notes: Discovered LoRAs can be inserted as prompt tokens with weights; true A1111 extension parity is not claimed.

styles/presets.notes: Local presets exist; A1111 style database parity is deferred.

prompt weighting.notes: Depends on stable-diffusion.cpp prompt parser behavior.

metadata save/read/restore.notes: Run manifests and metadata reads exist; arbitrary PNG restore is partial.

send-to workflows.notes: Gallery/image viewer can send to img2img, inpaint, and upscale.

history/gallery.notes: Run index, filters, detail, compare, and badges exist.

queue/progress/cancel.notes: In-memory job queue and progress polling exist; cancel is not implemented.

X/Y/Z plot.notes: Bounded axis support exists; not full A1111 plot parity.

variations.notes: Variation fields are visible as disabled controls.

batch processing.notes: Batch count/seed mode exist; batch size is intentionally 1.

settings/defaults.notes: Preset defaults and capability-driven options exist.

native API.notes: Operator Console API exists for current workflows.

command preview.notes: Read-only preview endpoint maps normalized jobs to real scripts.

JSON preview.notes: Read-only preview endpoint returns normalized payload.

BigMac Ollama prompt enhancement.notes: Not part of this stable-diffusion.cpp pass.
